title: Upstream Skills Manifest
description: Declares upstream GitHub repositories and paths to sync as system skills.

skills.description: List of upstream skills to sync.

name.description: Skill name (lowercase, hyphens). Must match the target folder name under skills/system/.

ref.description: Git branch or tag to sync from. Defaults to 'main'.

path.description: Path to the skill directory inside the repository (e.g. 'skills/playwright-cli').

frontmatter_overrides.description: YAML frontmatter fields to override in the upstream SKILL.md. Only specified fields are replaced; all other upstream fields are kept as-is.

description.description: Custom description for auto-triggering. Overrides the upstream description field.
